prompt: A finished 16:9 still, retro 16-bit pixel-art paper-collage aesthetic; the vast open Atlantic ocean seen from a low aerial view, endless rolling pixel waves in cold blue and blue-grey with dithered whitecaps, a faint far horizon under a moody overcast grey sky, lonely and immense, filling the whole frame. Light aged-paper grain and subtle CRT scanlines for texture continuity. Constraint: an empty immense ocean expanse conveying great distance across an ocean. Avoid: no land, no islands, no boats, no ships, no text, no numerals, no logos, no photoreal, no clutter.
